plugins.name: bluesky
plugins.description: Bluesky (AT Protocol) channel plugin for ZeroClaw: notification poll + threaded post replies over wasi:http.
plugins.author: JordanTheJet

plugins.name: discord
plugins.description: Discord channel plugin for ZeroClaw: Gateway WebSocket (host ws-client) + REST send over wasi:http.
plugins.author: JordanTheJet

plugins.name: line
plugins.description: LINE channel plugin for ZeroClaw: webhook ingress (host-verified) + Messaging API push over wasi:http.
plugins.author: JordanTheJet

plugins.name: mattermost
plugins.description: Mattermost channel plugin for ZeroClaw: v4 REST channel-post polling + createPost over wasi:http.
plugins.author: JordanTheJet

plugins.name: mochat
plugins.description: Mochat customer-service channel plugin for ZeroClaw: message-receive polling + message-send over wasi:http.
plugins.author: JordanTheJet

plugins.name: notion
plugins.description: Notion task-queue channel plugin for ZeroClaw: poll a database for pending tasks and write results back over wasi:http.
plugins.author: JordanTheJet

plugins.name: redact-text
plugins.description: Redact secrets and PII from text: emails, bearer/API tokens, and configured patterns
plugins.author: ZeroClaw Labs

plugins.name: reddit
plugins.description: Reddit channel plugin for ZeroClaw: message/unread long-poll + comment/compose over wasi:http.
plugins.author: JordanTheJet

plugins.name: telegram
plugins.description: Telegram channel plugin for ZeroClaw: getUpdates long-poll + sendMessage over wasi:http.
plugins.author: JordanTheJet

plugins.name: twitter
plugins.description: X/Twitter channel plugin for ZeroClaw: mentions polling + reply tweets over wasi:http.
plugins.author: JordanTheJet

plugins.name: wechat
plugins.description: WeChat (iLink Bot) channel plugin for ZeroClaw: getUpdates long-poll + sendMessage over wasi:http.
plugins.author: JordanTheJet
